### The power of

# Music Business Administration

Put your music career on the fast lane.

Promote, distribute and monetize with Songdew.

Join For Free ![Music Icon](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/icon_group.svg)

![MBA Logo](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/MBA%20logo%203.svg)

![Artist](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/banner_artist.png)

## Songdew Rocks Distribution

Promote your music release through Songdew, and you can reach your fans wherever they may be.

![Horn](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/horn.svg)![Sound Wave](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/sound_wave.svg)

![Gloap](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/gloap.svg)

### Think Worldwide!

Take your music to over 150 digital stores across 240 countries and territories in no time with Songdew.

![Gloap](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/gloap.svg)

### Making Your Music Make Money The Right Way

Streams, downloads, YouTube Monetization, Sync Licensing, Publishing Royalties, and more - anywhere you can earn money, we'll ensure we get you paid.

![Gloap](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/gloap.svg)

### Powerful Promotion Tools

From customized Social Media Banners and Instagram Stories to hosting a Preview Campaign, get everything you need to push your music forward.

[Know More >](https://songdew.com/artist/release-music)

Distribute Music

## Songdew Rocks Promotion

From TV to Radio to Digital, everything you need to take your music forward at just one click.

### 1

### Songdew TV

Reach 200 Mn households with Songdew TV, the only TV channel dedicated to pure, uncorrupted music.

### 2

### Radio Broadcast

Pitch your music to the programming teams of multiple Indian radio channels like Radio Indigo, Fever FM, etc.

### 3

### Promotion Cards

Get personalised assets to share your music with fans on social.

### 4

### Exclusive Digital Tools

DIY Digital Tools to help you create your marketing campaign.

[Know More >](https://songdew.com/artist/promotional-tools) Promote Your Music

![Distribute](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/distribute_blue.svg)![Sound Wave](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/sound_wave_white.svg)

![Artist](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/promote_artist_optimized.webp)

![Dollar](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/dollar_white.svg)![Sound Wave](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/sound_wave_white.svg)

![Artist](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/performance_artist_optimized.webp)

## How To Make Your Music Make Money

![Performance](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/performance.svg)

### Licensing with brands

Get licensing deals with some of the largest retail outlets in the country

![Performance](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/performance.svg)

### Production Opportunities

Produce music / jingles for most admired brands in the country

![Performance](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/performance.svg)

### Live Performances

Get opportunities to perform at some of the most desired / admired events and venues

Explore Opportunities

## Join a network of 70K+ emerging and major artists

## Accelerate your music career, your way

![Career](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/glow.svg)

Sell and stream your music worldwide

![Career](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/glow.svg)

Monetize your music with licensing and production opportunities from some of the biggest brands

![Career](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/glow.svg)

Stand out from the crowd and get noticed by Industry stakeholders through our easy to build and super customizable e-Press Kit

![Career](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/glow.svg)

Get access to exclusive digital promotion tools to run DIY marketing campaigns

![Career](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/glow.svg)

Connect with industry stakeholders & promote your music on playlists, radios, blogs and more

![Career](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/glow.svg)

Take your music on the biggest media platform - the television with Songdew TV

Release Your Music

![Artist](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/career_artist.webp)

### Be part Of Songdew

## Experience the Power of Music Business Administration

Distribute, Promote, Monetize all in one place.

Join Songdew Community ![Music Icon](https://songdew.com/assets/image/home-page/icon_group.svg)

secondary.reasoning: The button 'Explore Opportunities' serves as a secondary action, encouraging further engagement with the platform.

json.company_description: Songdew provides tools and resources for musicians to promote, distribute, and monetize their music. It connects artists with fans and industry stakeholders through various services including distribution to digital stores, promotional tools, and licensing opportunities.

formState.extractPrompt: Extract the company details, following the schema.
